channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Manhole sunk & loose kerbstones, 25th March
item.description:
The drain has sunk & the tarmac all broken up with the kerbstones now loose. Buses are having to give it a wide birth crossing the white line.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ashfield Lane, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti, 25th March
item.description:
Graffiti

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Thyme Close, Kidbrooke
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter on Queens Drive, 25th March
item.description:
Litter on Queens Drive - West side in various places (see photos)

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Queens Drive, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter always gathers in car park, 25th March
item.description:
Litter always gathers in the corners and edges of the car park. Around the recycling bins it is cleaned nicely but the rest of the ca park is ignored. Please can this be corrected as the constant litter in the rest of the car park also moves into the surrounding streets and is bringing this area of Welling down.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bellegrove Road, Welling, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish dumped in the alleyway next to 19 Wellington Road, 25th March
item.description:
Someone has dumped rubbish (a bag stuffed with rubbish and paint can) in the alleyway that links Wellington Road with Great Elms Road. The rubbish is next to 19 Wellington Road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wellington Road, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Someone has left a couch in front of my house., 25th March
item.description:
Someone has left a couch in front of my house. This is a continuing problem as this seems to be a dumping ground.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Crossway, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Long road defects outside number 192, 25th March
item.description:
These long potholes have been there for years and despite being reported several times nothing has been done.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Knollys Road, West Norwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipped furniture, 25th March
item.description:
Blocked footpath
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Parkside Avenue, Barnehurst, Greater London

item.title: Road sign fell on the floor and caused my tyre’s damage, 25th March
item.description:
While I was driving down the hill there was some road work, I did not notice the sign was on the floor looks like the wind dropped it, I could not avoid it as there was other cars parked waiting for the temporary traffic light to go green and could not use the emergency stop causing damage to the previous cars so I had no choice but to drive on the sign, my tyre popped on the sport I had to emergency park on the side and called the emergency tyre fitting, they charged me £185 to fix the tyre. Im requiring a compensation of the repair and the two hours that prevented me from varying my work.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wightman Road, Harringay, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Reported bin bottom of Z on Dallin Rd, overflowing two weeks ago. Will continue to happen as other bin on Z removes, 25th March
item.description:
OVER Flowing Bin Other Bin removed . The reason for this: encourages Fly tipping! So now have Overflowing bin and Fly Tipping. As reported recently

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Plum Lane, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Circular sign on pole is leaning diagonally / about to fall down, 25th March
item.description:
Speed sign at the end of manor drive where it meets B550 is leaning on its side
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 101, Friern Barnet Lane, Whetstone, Greater London

item.title: Street sign damaged, 24th March
item.description:
Hi. All the ‘Brightling Road’ street signs are damaged, mouldy and blackened and need replacing. I’ve attached one picture but please change all 4 (left and right side of street, top and bottom of street). This has been like this for several years now. I’ve complained previously to the council but nothing has been done and it’s getting worse. Thank you.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brightling Road, Honor Oak, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
